a,r in ipairs({{151068-151067;514407-514019};{-993302+993303;-739136+739227};{-566386-(-566478),-715661-(-716049)}})do while r[-921833-(-921834)]<r[-528646-(-528648)]do local function a(a)return u[a+(-946715+1007101)]end do local a=u local r=string.len local o=type local J=table.insert local P=string.sub local i=math.floor local H=table.concat local while A<=o do local u=P(d,A,A)local a=p[u]if a then E=E+a*(25951+-25887)^((845083+-845080)-e)e=e+(532269+-532268)if e==97894-97890 then e=331717+-331717 local u=i(E/(18654-(-46882)))local return(function(u,o,J,P,i,H,p,t,D,M,r,e,B,T,E,A,x,d,Z,C,k,F,R)r,e,d,B,M,x,Z,T,A,R,k,E,t,D,C,F=function(r,J,P,i)local y,b,p,j,xA,oA,N,A,DA,eA,AA,rA,JA,K,g,h,v,w,c,d,iA,I,pA,z,BA,MA,G,uA,E,X,U,TA,CA,dA,f,n,S,L,kA,Y,W,Q,V,EA,q,s,ZA,C,HA,e,aA,m,l,O,RA,PA,tA while r do if r<7293884-(-675362)then if
